zh.lifeSummary: 當Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken於大約1214年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可列福時，他的父親Dietrich VI. von Kleve31歲，母親Mathilde von Dinslaken21歲。他於1233年3月19日與Elisabeth van Brabant在比利時布拉班特洛文結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1234年登記服兵役。他去世於1245年3月24日在海因里希_海普洛文次阿爾騰吉陳維森享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken于大约1214年出生在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可列福时，他的父亲Dietrich VI. von Kleve31岁，母亲Mathilde von Dinslaken21岁。他于1233年3月19日与Elisabeth van Brabant在比利时布拉班特洛文结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1234年登记服兵役。他去世于1245年3月24日在海因里希_海普洛文次阿爾騰吉陳維森享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: cleves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire): possibly a variant of English   Chevis  . Compare   Cheeves  .
History: Langdon Cheves (1776–1857), a congressman and financier, was born in Abbeville District, SC. His father was Alexander Chivas, of Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

variants.name: Chevis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Monique.

English (Sussex): from Middle English cheuyn, Old French chevesne ‘chub’, possibly applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble the fish in some way, or as a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller.

nameMeanings.name: Thierry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Germanic Theodoric, composed of elements meaning ‘people’ and ‘rule’. Compare Terry .

en.lifeSummary: When Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken was born about 1214, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, his father, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, was 31 and his mother, Mathilde von Dinslaken, was 21. He married Elisabeth van Brabant on 19 March 1233, in Leuven, Brabant, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1234. He died on 24 March 1245, in Wissen, Altenkirchen, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken est né environ 1214, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Dinslaken, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth van Brabant le 19 mars 1233, à Leuven, Brabant, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1234. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1245, à Wissen, Altenkirchen, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken um 1214 in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich VI. von Kleve 31 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Dinslaken 21. Er hat am 19. März 1233 in Leuven, Brabant, Belgien Elisabeth van Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1234 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 24. März 1245 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Wissen, Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken è nato il circa 1214 nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Dinslaken, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth van Brabant il 19 marzo 1233, nel Leuven, Brabante, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1234. Morì il 24 marzo 1245, nel Wissen, Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thierry of cleves lord of dinslakenが約1214年にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで生まれた時，父Dietrich VI. von Kleveは31歳，母Mathilde von Dinslakenは21歳であった。1233年3月19日にベルギーブラバントレウベンでElisabeth van Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1234年に兵役登録をした。彼は1245年3月24日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズアルテンキルチェンウィセンで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken(이)가 대략 1214년 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich VI. von Kleve(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Dinslaken(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1233년 3월 19일 벨기에 브라반트 레우븐에서 Elisabeth van Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1245년 3월 24일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 알텐커천 와이센에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken nasceu aproximadamente 1214, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Dinslaken, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth van Brabant em 19 de março de 1233, em Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1234. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1245, em Wissen, Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken родился около 1214 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Dietrich VI. von Kleve было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Dinslaken, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth van Brabant 19 марта 1233 г. в местности леувен, брабант, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. В 1234 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 24 марта 1245 г. в местности виссен, алтенкирчэн, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thierry of cleves lord of dinslaken nació aproximadamente 1214, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Dinslaken, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elisabeth van Brabant el 19 de marzo de 1233, en Leuven, Brabante, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1234. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1245, en Wissen, Altenkirchen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 32 años.
